category_sources: Official rbenv manual says ruby-build downloads, compiles, and installs Ruby versions.
source_facts.description says it installs Ruby versions and implementations.
display_name_sources: Official manual page and GitHub README use ruby-build.
docs_sources: Official manual notes link the README and wiki.
source_facts.homepage is the official ruby-build manual page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/rbenv/ruby-build; per instruction repo is returned as null when source_facts.repo is present.
tags_sources: Official README describes ruby-build as a command-line tool for installing Ruby from source and as an rbenv plugin.
source_facts.description identifies installing Ruby versions and implementations.
